name: instructions_content
description: Task Instructions: Private Query Quality Assessment
labels:
Overview

In this task you will evaluate a series of user queries that were sent to an AI assistant. Each query may contain personally identifiable information (PII) — details such as real names, locations, company names, or medical information that could identify a real person or organisation.

An automatic tool (GLiNER) has already attempted to detect PII in each query. Your job is to assess the quality of those detections and provide your own judgement about the query.

What You Will See

For each item the platform displays:

ElementDescription
User QueryThe original message sent to the AI assistant.
PII detected by GLiNERA table of text spans flagged as PII with their predicted type (e.g. first_name, company_name, city).

Your Annotation Task

For each query, answer the question shown on screen:

  1. Is this a naturally-occurring user query containing private PII?
    Decide whether the query genuinely contains information that could identify a real, private individual or organisation. Do not select Yes for queries about public figures or well-known entities.
Tip: Focus on the query text itself. PII refers to information about real, identifiable private individuals or organisations — not hypothetical or clearly fictitious ones.

PII Types Reference

TypeExamples
first_name / last_nameVonie, Smith
company_nameManulife, ABC Brokers
city / countryGirard, China
email / phoneuser@example.com, +1-555-0100
medicaldiagnoses, medications, patient details

Important Guidelines

  • Do not search for any names, companies, or locations you encounter.
  • Do not copy or share any content from the queries outside this platform.
  • If a query feels ambiguous, use your best judgement and move on — there is no single correct answer for every case.
  • Work through the items at a steady pace; do not rush.

Example

User Query:

“Hello! This is Vonie from the Manulife Campus Recruitment team. Can you extract the key skills from this job description?”

GLiNER detections:
EntityType
Voniefirst_name

How to annotate: The query does contain PII — “Vonie” is a real first name and “Manulife” is a real company name. Answer Yes.

name: read_instructions
description: I have read and understood the instructions above.
